for the following 
variables in the Clinical and Staging file: AJCC_EDITION, CNCR_TYPE_RPTD, ESTROGEN_RECEPTOR, 
HER2_AMPLIFICATION, HISTOLOGY, ICD10_CNCR_DGNS_CD_RPTD, INITL_DGNS_DT, METASTASIS, 
NODAL_DISEASE, PRMRY_TUMOR, and PROGESTERONE_RECEPTOR. Such beneficiaries will also not 
have records in the current clinical status file. 

 A second group of beneficiaries also has blank values for the variables listed above, those where 
RPTD_TO_RGSTRY = 1 but whose reported values were determined
